conjectures.title: Caching reduces p99 latency by 50%
conjectures.hypothesis: Adding Redis cache for DB queries will cut tail latency in half
evidence: TLA+ maps well: 5 states (open/testing/confirmed/refuted/abandoned), guards as ENABLED conditions
Key invariants: confirmed requires hypothesis+2 evidence, refuted requires 1 evidence, abandoned always reachable

conjectures.title: Dark mode increases engagement
conjectures.hypothesis: Users with dark mode enabled have 10% longer sessions
evidence: A/B test setup with 5000 users per cohort

conjectures.title: Null hypothesis: button color doesn't matter
conjectures.hypothesis: Red vs blue CTA button has no significant conversion difference

conjectures.title: State machine is intuitive and passes TLA+ specifications
conjectures.hypothesis: Guards and transitions can be formally verified with TLA+
evidence: TLA+ maps well: 5 states (open/testing/confirmed/refuted/abandoned), guards as ENABLED conditions
Key invariants: confirmed requires hypothesis+2 evidence, refuted requires 1 evidence, abandoned always reachable

conjectures.title: cprr fills a unique niche not covered by claude-code-tools
conjectures.hypothesis: claude-code-tools focuses on session/env management, not hypothesis tracking with formal guards
evidence: claude-code-tools contains: aichat (session mgmt), tmux-cli (terminal automation), vault (env backup), env-safe (env inspection) - no hypothesis/experiment tracking
cprr provides: state machine with guards, hypothesis->testing->confirmed workflow, evidence requirements - complementary not overlapping

conjectures.title: cprr methodology aligns with multi-agent debate workflows (Mysti HN discussion)
conjectures.hypothesis: Conjecture-refutation cycle mirrors how multiple agents challenge and synthesize solutions
evidence: Mysti (HN 46365105): multi-agent debate where models challenge each other's approaches - analogous to conjecture/refutation cycle
Key insight from discussion: 'if a model introduces a bug, it has hard time spotting it, but another model can instantly spot it' - supports systematic hypothesis testing across perspectives

conjectures.title: cprr can be packaged as an Agent Skills skill
conjectures.hypothesis: SKILL.md + scripts/ structure maps to cprr's CLI and methodology
evidence: SKILL.md created with: overview, workflow, commands, evidence standards, best practices, example session - follows agent-skills pattern
Structure maps: SKILL.md (instructions) exists, cprr CLI provides scripts/ equivalent via make targets, docs/ contains references/ - minimal viable skill package complete

conjectures.title: Alloy is better than TLA+ for cprr's small state machines
conjectures.hypothesis: Alloy's relational logic and built-in visualization provide faster iteration for bounded state spaces like cprr's 5-state machine
evidence: Alloy advantages for cprr: (1) relational model fits guard predicates naturally, (2) Analyzer generates counterexamples visually, (3) bounded checking sufficient for 5 states × small evidence counts, (4) no temporal operators needed - guards are structural not temporal

TLA+ overhead for cprr: (1) temporal logic ([]/<>) overkill for simple guards, (2) TLC model checker designed for distributed systems concurrency, (3) no built-in visualization, (4) steeper learning curve for structural properties
Alloy spec (cprr.als) is 140 lines: guards as predicates, transitions as relations, invariants as assertions with 'check' - directly maps to cprr's domain model without temporal logic overhead
